metadata.title: Islamic Agricultural Finance | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank’s Islamic Agricultural Finance enable the farming sector to avail Shariah-compliant financing for their needs.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Agricultural Financing Islamic Financing for Agricultural Products If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Your Facilitation, Our Responsibility Meezan Bank is recognized as the leader and trendsetter in Islamic Banking in Pakistan by virtue of it being the first to provide a myriad of Shariah-compliant financial products for both domestic and corporate customers. Continuing this tradition, Meezan Bank has also launched Islamic Agricultural Finance to enable the farming sector to avail Shariah-compliant financing for their needs. In addition to other permissible modes of financing, the Bank offers the following specific Agricultural Financing products: Financing Schemes Meezan Tractor Assaan Meezan Bank provides a Shariah-compliant product for acquire Tractors for mechanized farming. Meezan Tractor Aasaan finance is available to: Individual Farmers (Farm & Non-Farm) Corporate Farming Tractors Requirement Financing Tenure is from 3 to 5 years. Payment frequency can be either monthly, quarterly or half yearly. Meezan Agri Assaan To provide financing opportunities on a fast track basis with maximum ease and comfort. It offers trade, participatory and rental based modes of financing. Meezan AgriAasaan is available to: Individual/Corporate Entities having Cash Collateral in shape of MBL COII’s/Certificates and Line marking be either monthly, quarterly, half yearly, or yearly. Meezan Fasal To provide financing for agricultural input requirements for farmers who may receive full payment of agri produce in advance against deferred delivery of goods on a specified future date. Meezan FaslAasaan to: Individual Farmers engaged in farm activities Corporate Farming Financing tenure is as per cropping cycle maximum up to 18 months. can be either lump sum or in tranches. Contact our Dedicated Representatives If you are require assistance, details or are interested applying for Islamic Agricultural Financing, you may contact our Agriculture Financing representatives at the following locations: Muhammad Mati Adil In Charge Agriculture Finance Agriculture Finance Unit Commercial Banking Department Meezan House, C-25, Estate Avenue, SITE, Karachi, Pakistan PABX: +92 (21) 38103500 Ext. 2403 Fax: +92 (21) 36406081 Email: mati.adil@meezanbank.com Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Would you like more information? Fill out the form below and you will be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
